title: Bo-Nian Chen
text: Home * People * Bo-Nian Chen Bo-Nian Chen , a Taiwanese computer scientist at Department of Computer Science and Information Engineering, National Taiwan University . His research includes knowledge abstraction and inference in the game domains of Computer Chinese Chess [1] and their Endgame Tablebases , and Chinese Dark Chess or Half Chess [2] , a two players board game, played on a 4x8 grid. Along with Tsan-sheng Hsu , Bo-Nian Chen is co-author of the Chinese Dark Chess program Flipper .
